overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character walking through a sunlit Mediterranean-style village with stone buildings and palm trees. The character navigates narrow passages and open plazas with smooth camera movement typical of modern game engines.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between tall stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow stone corridor toward a large building with a tower

entered.detail: tall weathered stone wall forming the left boundary of the passage
tall weathered stone wall forming the right boundary of the passage
large beige stone building with a prominent central tower and arched windows
cluster of palm trees visible beyond the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed passage between tall stone walls, approaching a large beige building with a central tower. The ground is reddish dirt, and palm trees are visible in the distance beyond the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: path alongside the large tower building

events.description: character turns right to follow the path alongside the tower building

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking along the side of the large stone building, passing a moss-covered wall section

entered.detail: stone wall covered in green moss and vegetation on the right side
large rock outcroppings and stone formations ahead in the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character turns right to walk alongside the large tower building, moving from the narrow passage to a wider path. The moss-covered wall appears on the right while rock formations become visible ahead in the open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees and rock formations

events.description: character turns left toward the open plaza with palm trees
transitioning from building corridor to open plaza area with vegetation

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking toward an open plaza area with palm trees and rock formations

entered.detail: group of tall palm trees in the center of the open area
cluster of dark brown stone houses with pointed roofs on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a wide open plaza with palm trees and rock formations. The large tower building falls behind as dark stone houses come into view on the right, and the environment becomes more open with full sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone walkway past dark stone houses

events.description: character turns right onto an elevated stone pathway

agents.ego_description: turning right onto an elevated stone walkway and walking past dark stone buildings with pointed roofs

entered.detail: raised stone walkway with paved surface running along the dark buildings
yellowish stone buildings with shuttered windows in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: The character turns right onto an elevated stone walkway, bringing the dark stone buildings into close view on the right. The path is paved with stone tiles, and yellow houses become visible in the distance on the left as the character continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined stone corridor into a wide, sunlit Mediterranean plaza. It begins with the character navigating a narrow passage between tall stone walls on reddish dirt, moving toward a large beige building with a central tower. As the character turns right to follow the tower, the space expands from the enclosure into a wider path flanked by moss-covered walls and distant rock formations. The scene then opens into a broad plaza filled with palm trees and dark stone houses, leaving the tower behind as the sky becomes fully visible. Finally, the camera turns right onto an elevated stone walkway, bringing the dark buildings into close view while yellow houses appear in the distance.
